query:
insert into DirectTracedElements (
                            last_collect_nr,
                            file_hash,
                            traced_line,
                            element_definition_line
                        )
                        values (
                            $1,
                            $2,
                            $3,
                            $4
                        )
                        on conflict (file_hash, traced_line, element_definition_line)
                        do update set
                            last_collect_nr = excluded.last_collect_nr
